The '''''Degathem''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during [[Arms Race|the "Arms Race"]]. The ''Degathem'' and the ''[[Anterab]]'' were delivering supplies critical for
the development of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] starfighter. Despite rebel attempts
to end the phase by raiding the Imperial research station, both ships completed their
mission and delivered the supplies.

==Behind the scenes==
''Degathem'' is an anagram of [[Wikipedia:Megadeth|''Megadeth'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
